name: Eve Holding, Inc.
business: Eve Holding, Inc. develops a comprehensive Urban Air Mobility (UAM) solution including the design and production of electric vertical take-off and landing vehicles (eVTOLs), a portfolio of maintenance and support services named TechCare, and an Urban Air Traffic Management system named Vector. The company plans to market its eVTOLs globally to operators of UAM services, including fixed-wing and helicopter operators, as well as lessors that purchase and manage aircraft on behalf of operators.

exposures.sentence: We are developing a comprehensive UAM solution that includes: the design and production of electric vertical take-off and landing vehicles (eVTOLs); a portfolio of maintenance and support services, named TechCare, focused on our and third-party eVTOLs; and a new Urban Air Traffic Management system, named Vector, designed to allow eVTOLs to operate safely and efficiently in dense urban airspace alongside conventional aircraft and drones.
We are performing research and development on battery systems and other electric powertrain components in order to maximize the performance of the aircraft through lab bench and rig tests.

catalysts.event: First flight of full-scale engineering prototype
catalysts.sentence: Eve flew our full-scale engineering prototype in December 2025, starting several flight tests with the vehicle.

catalysts.event: ANAC published Final Airworthiness Criteria for eVTOL certification
catalysts.sentence: On November 1, 2024, ANAC published the Final Airworthiness Criteria for Eve's eVTOL certification in Brazil.

catalysts.event: FAA issued Special Federal Aviation Regulation for AAM
catalysts.sentence: On October 22, 2024, the FAA issued the Special Federal Aviation Regulation (SFAR) that details the final rules for Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) and covers eVTOL pilot certification and operations.

catalysts.event: Announcement of first eVTOL production facility location
catalysts.sentence: In 2023, the Company announced that its first eVTOL production facility will be located in the city of Taubaté, in the state of São Paulo, Brazil.
While we have converted the first firm order in 2025, most of our agreements with our customers are non-binding

tamClaims.claim: Initial order pipeline of approximately 2,700 vehicles valued at approximately $14 billion from 28 launch customers
tamClaims.sentence: To date, we have established an initial order pipeline of approximately 2,700 vehicles valued at approximately $14 billion from 28 launch customers.
